case_title: EUREKABANK, A FEDERAL SAVINGS BANK, FORMERLY vs. DE LA PENA & ASSOCIATES et al

docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT DE LA PENA & ASSOCIATES

JUDGE GEORGE T. CHOPPELLAS, M. BRADY, REPORTER, ASAUSA,CLERK 10:55AM C/C FOR TRIAL BY COURT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. G.S HARMON FOR PLTF, A. DE LA PENA FOR DEFT. CASE SETTLED. TERMS STATED ON RECORD. JUDGMENT FOR THE PLAINTIFF AND AGAINST THE DEFENDANT FOR THE DAMAGES IN THE AMOUNT OF $5,219.18, ATTY. FEES $0.00, COSTS $168.00 TOTAL OF $5,387.18. RESTITUTION OF THE SUBJECT PREMISES LOCATED AT 1435 STOCKTON STREET, SUITE B-7. MONETARY PORTION OF JUDGMENT SHALL BE DEEMED SATISFIED IN FULL IF DEFENDANT VACATES THE PREMISES BY 10:00AM, OCTOBER 3, 1994. IF DEFT VACATES THE PREMISES BY OCTOBER 3, 1994 THE JUDGMENT SHALL BE SET ASIDE AND DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. EXECUTION STAYED UNTIL OCTOBER 3, 1994.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DE LA PENA & ASSOCIATES THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1435 STOCKTON STREET, SUITE B-7, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $5,219.18 RENT, $168.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,387.18, STAYED UNTIL OCT-03-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, THE MONETARY PORTION OF THIS JUDGT SHALL BE DEEMED SATISFIED IN FULL IF DEFT VACATES THE PREMISES BY 10:00AM, 10/3/94. IN THE EVENT THAT DEFT VACATES THE PREMISES BY 10:00AM, 10/3/94 THE JUDGMENT SHALL BE SET ASIDE AND DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
